metadata.title: Shy Boy (Extended Version)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:16.73] He used to be a shy boy
[00:20.57] Until I made him my boy
[00:24.17] I never missed a heartbeat
[00:27.85] Just sitting in the back seat
[00:33.76] I'm gonna give him all my love
[00:37.47] Each and every night
[00:41.05] One thing I know he's dreaming of
[00:44.66] I wanna squeeze and hold him tight
[00:48.22] But don't it make you feel good
[00:50.09] (Shoop shoop aaahh)
[00:51.93] And don't it make you feel good
